items.title: Woman Pleads Guilty to Manslaughter After Gun-Themed Polaroid Photo Shoot Ends with Photographer’s Death
items.summary: A Las Vegas woman has pleaded guilty to manslaughter after her photographer friend was shot dead as he was taking pictures on a Polaroid camera of her and a friend toting guns. [Read More]

items.title: Mars Probe Declared Dead by NASA
items.summary: NASA has announced the death of one of its Mars imaging probes, MAVEN, after losing contact with the spacecraft at the end of last year. [Read More]

items.title: New Trump Rule Could Cut Enrollment at Nearly Half of Arts MA Programs
items.summary: The controversial proposal would measure alumni income to determine whether a program can matriculate students who take out federal loans.
